static.name: Firefly Aerospace Inc.
static.description: Firefly Aerospace Inc. operates as a space and defense technology company and provides mission solutions for national security, government, and commercial customers. The company offers integrated launch and space services technology that is committed to enabling launch, transit, and operations in space. It also provides Launch solutions, such as Alpha, a responsive launch services; and Eclipse, a medium-lift launch vehicles. In addition, the company offers spacecraft solutions platforms, including Blue Ghost, a lunar delivery and operation service; and Elytra, which provides space maneuverability and servicing. Further, it provides software and sensor solutions; national security software and big data processing capabilities; and responsive space services, as well as Ocula, a lunar imaging service. Firefly Aerospace Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Cedar Park, Texas.

claude.thesis: Vertically integrated launch + lunar services. Launch-to-landing capability. Impressive breadth but unsustainable economics.
bullCase: Broadest portfolio (Alpha, Eclipse, Blue Ghost, Elytra, Ocula)

news.headline: SpaceX Hype Lifts Industry Stocks
news.summary: Space stocks are rocketing upwards. AST SpaceMobile and Virgin Galactic have each risen more than 9% in Friday's trading session, extending gains from Thursday driven by SpaceX's move toward an initial public offering.

news.headline: SpaceX IPO Filing Is Moving Rocket Lab, CoreWeave, and Other Stocks
news.summary: SpaceX’s IPO filing is reshaping how investors value launch, satellite, and AI infrastructure companies including Rocket Lab, AST SpaceMobile, CoreWeave, Firefly Aerospace, and EchoStar.

news.headline: SpaceX Delays Starship Launch. IPO Prospectus Due This Week.
news.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX this week will launch its next Starship flight, release the prospectus for its $1.75 trillion IPO.
